description: §21.3 — a 2-file import cycle (case.scrml imports fromA from a.scrml; a.scrml imports fromEntry back from case.scrml) is detected and fires E-IMPORT-002. Uses the `files` convention: a.scrml is an aux sibling forming the cycle.
rationale: §21.3 module resolution detects circular imports. case.scrml -> a.scrml -> case.scrml is a cycle; the compiler rejects it E-IMPORT-002 (break the cycle by extracting shared code into a third file).
